markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review December performance and align on Q1 content priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**December Performance:** Hit new traffic highs despite the holiday break, driven by a successful top-funnel strategy that increased non-branded impressions and direct traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Q1 Priorities:** Focus on new integration pages, refreshing underperforming content (e.g., Next.js, Astro), and creating listicles to close LLM visibility gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [**Comparison Page Fix:** The CM entry issue will be resolved by simplifying the collection to only store logos and automating the front-end grid generation.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**LLM Referral Traffic:** A downtrend in overall LLM traffic will be monitored through January. If it continues, a content audit and architecture review will be triggered.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

## Topics

### December Performance Review

  - [**Overall:** Hit new traffic highs despite the holiday break.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**SEO & Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Non-branded impressions and sessions increased significantly.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
      - [Direct traffic (users typing Strapi URLs) rose, a key indicator of strong brand recognition.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
      - [Keyword Rankings (Google data):](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
          - [Top 1: 2,556 keywords](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
          - [Top 2-10: 9,300+ keywords](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [**HubSpot Goals:**](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
      - [**Exceeded:** Session goals.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
      - [**Decreased:** New and influenced contacts.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This aligns with the top-funnel strategy initiated in October, which prioritizes traffic over immediate conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [**Underperforming Keywords:**](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
      - [Keywords for key topics (Next.js, Astro, AWS CMS) are ranking outside the top 10.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
      - [**Action:** Vivek to provide a list of associated pages for refresh by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)

### LLM Performance & Strategy

  - [**Overall Referral Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [A downtrend has been observed since July.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [**Action:** Monitor through January.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [**Contingency (if trend continues):** Audit product/institution pages, increase content refreshes, and review comparison page architecture.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [**Scrunch Data (Prompt Tracking):**](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
      - [**Dominance:** Strapi leads competitors (Sanity, Contentful) in query visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
      - [**Metrics:** 70% of responses are top-ranked; 92% positive sentiment.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
      - [**Visibility Gaps:** Analysis revealed \~70 queries where competitors appear but Strapi does not.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
          - [**Pattern:** Most are bottom-funnel listicles (e.g., "best CMS for X," "alternatives to Y").](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
          - [**Action:** Vivek to add these topics to Airtable for review by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)

### Q1 Content Priorities

  - [**Primary Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
      - [New integration pages.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
      - [Closing LLM visibility gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
      - [Developer content.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
      - [Content for the agency owner persona.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [**Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [Balance new content with refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [**Rationale:** As the content library grows, refreshes will likely yield better incremental performance than new articles.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [**Refresh Criteria:** Loss of keyword rankings or traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:** The team has sufficient topics to cover all of Q1.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)

### Technical & Content Updates

  - [**Comparison Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
      - [**Notum Task:** The comparison page build is in Notum's queue.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
      - [**Video Integration:** Complete. Vivek to send a monthly list of new pages for video additions.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [**Page Preview Bug:**](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
      - [**Status:** The preview button is broken.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
      - [**Workaround:** Changes are visible on the live preview.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
      - [**Action:** Theo to follow up with Notum.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [**CM Entry Issue (Comparison Page Logos):**](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Problem:** The CM collection lacks all necessary competitor platforms, blocking updates.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Solution:** Simplify the collection to only store logos and automate front-end grid generation.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX to update the collection; Notum to handle automation.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
      - [Send content review list to Theo by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
      - [Provide underperforming keyword list for refresh by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
      - [Add LLM visibility gap topics to Airtable by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
      - [Send new CTA text preview to Victor via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
  - [**Theo:**](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
      - [Follow up with Notum on the page preview bug.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Update the CM collection with only competitor logos.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [**Notum:**](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
      - [Automate the comparison page logo grid generation.](https://fathom.video/share/PsPMs-UMyytsk67no-Kbkbq5czCa9hEQ?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
